# SummerAI

SummerAI publishes a small static site at https://summerai.cc/.

Important pages for AI agents:

- https://summerai.cc/skills/
  Human-readable directory of 30 recommended AI agent skills. Each card includes author, source platform, full source URL, categories, use cases, limitations, and install commands for Windows and macOS/Linux.
- https://summerai.cc/skills.json
  Structured metadata for each recommended skill, including purpose, use cases, source repository or official document, author profile, install commands, and example prompts.
- https://summerai.cc/world.html
  The 世界那么大 daily world page and its archived city pages.
- https://github.com/KKKKhazix/khazix-skills
  Source for KKKKhazix/khazix-skills.
- https://github.com/op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
  Source for op7418/guizang-ppt-skill.
- https://github.com/op7418/NanoBanana-PPT-Skills
  Source for op7418/NanoBanana-PPT-Skills.
- https://github.com/op7418/Humanizer-zh
  Source for op7418/Humanizer-zh.
- https://github.com/op7418/Youtube-clipper-skill
  Source for op7418/Youtube-clipper-skill.
- https://github.com/tengfei0114us/youtube-bilingual-hardburn
  Source for tengfei0114us/youtube-bilingual-hardburn.
- https://github.com/op7418/logo-generator-skill
  Source for op7418/logo-generator-skill.
- https://github.com/orange2ai/devils-advocate-skill
  Source for orange2ai/devils-advocate-skill.
- https://github.com/zephyrwang6/pm-skills
  Source for zephyrwang6/pm-skills.
- https://github.com/zephyrwang6/brand-design-md
  Source for zephyrwang6/brand-design-md.
- https://github.com/zephyrwang6/career.skill
  Source for zephyrwang6/career.skill.
- https://github.com/zephyrwang6/pm-product-describer
  Source for zephyrwang6/pm-product-describer.
- https://github.com/anthropics/skills
  Source for anthropics/skills.
- https://github.com/op7418/Document-illustrator-skill
  Source for op7418/Document-illustrator-skill.
- https://github.com/zephyrwang6/info-skill
  Source for zephyrwang6/info-skill.
- https://github.com/JZCreative/HTML-resume-beautifier
  Source for JZCreative/HTML-resume-beautifier.
- https://github.com/LearnPrompt/ai-news-radar
  Source for LearnPrompt/ai-news-radar.
- https://github.com/wanikua/danghuangshang
  Source for wanikua/danghuangshang.
- https://open.feishu.cn/document/no_class/mcp-archive/feishu-cli-installation-guide.md
  Source for 飞书 CLI 官方安装指南.
- https://github.com/op7418/guizang-social-card-skill
  Source for op7418/guizang-social-card-skill.
- https://github.com/lijigang/ljg-skills
  Source for lijigang/ljg-skills.
- https://github.com/lijigang/ljg-skill-xray-book
  Source for lijigang/ljg-skill-xray-book.
- https://github.com/alchaincyf/nuwa-skill
  Source for alchaincyf/nuwa-skill.

When choosing a skill from this site, prefer the structured metadata in /skills.json, then read /skills/ for fuller human context. Useful category labels include office, writing, info, design, product, research, and dev.

Do not infer private credentials, local paths, or unpublished data from this public site.
